notes: Coverage estimation based on 83 tests created across platform-specific and IPC modules. Accurate measurement requires CI/CD workflow (ubuntu-latest runner) due to tarpaulin linking errors on macOS x86_64. Final coverage to be verified by .github/workflows/desktop-coverage.yml.

areas_covered: Windows file dialogs (open, save, folder picker)
Windows temp directory operations (TEMP env var)
Windows system info and environment variables
macOS system info and environment variables
Linux system info and environment variables
File operations (read, write, list, copy, metadata)

critical: Full Tauri command integration tests (require full app context)
low: Tauri setup and main function (framework code)
Error handling edge cases (covered partially by IPC tests)

recommendations: Run .github/workflows/desktop-coverage.yml to obtain accurate baseline and final coverage measurements
Phase 142 should focus on integration tests requiring full Tauri app context
Add system tray tests (15-20 tests estimated, +5-8% coverage)
Add device capability tests (10-15 tests estimated, +3-5% coverage)
Add async command error path tests (10-15 tests estimated, +3-5% coverage)
Add per-module coverage thresholds for main.rs critical sections
Consider adding property-based tests for file operations (quickcheck/proptest)

phase_141_summary.target_achieved: 40-50% target partially met (35% estimated, accurate measurement pending CI/CD)

verification_required.next_step: Update final_coverage.json with actual measurements from CI/CD
